claim_text: Physical activity level has no association with the difference in maximal oxygen consumption between black and white youth.

runs.response_text:
VERDICT: NEI

The abstracts provided do not contain information about maximal oxygen consumption (VO2max) or comparisons of this measure between black and white youth in relation to physical activity levels. The first abstract discusses physical activity and television watching in relation to body weight and fatness in children of different ethnic groups, but does not measure or report on maximal oxygen consumption. VERDICT: NEI  
The abstracts provided do not directly address the claim regarding the association between physical activity levels and maximal oxygen consumption differences between black and white youth. While the first abstract discusses physical activity in children, it does not provide specific information about oxygen consumption or racial differences in that context.

VERDICT: NEI
None of the provided abstracts discuss maximal oxygen consumption or its relationship to physical activity levels and racial differences in youth. The abstracts focus on body weight/fatness and physical activity, genetic associations with atrial fibrillation, and serum soluble corin in pregnancy.

VERDICT: NEI

The provided abstracts do not contain information about maximal oxygen consumption (VO2 max) differences between black and white youth or the relationship between physical activity and VO2 max in these populations. The closest abstract (doc_id 8428935) discusses physical activity and body weight/fatness in children by ethnicity, but does not address maximal oxygen consumption.

VERDICT: NEI
The provided abstracts discuss the relationship between physical activity, television watching, and body weight/fatness in children, as well as genetic factors for atrial fibrillation and soluble corin levels related to hypertensive disorders. None of these abstracts address the association between physical activity level and maximal oxygen consumption differences between black and white youth.
